message:
fix(firecracker): use configured ImagesPath instead of hardcoded path

CreateVM and DeleteVM now use the configured ZFS.ImagesPath and
ZFS.VMsPath instead of hardcoded "stockyard/images" and "stockyard/vms"
paths. This ensures consistency with ensureBaseImage in daemon.go
which already used the configured paths.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,6 +58,8 @@ func New(cfg *config.Config, secretsProvider secrets.Provider) (*Daemon, error)
 			KernelPath: cfg.Firecracker.KernelPath,
 			RootfsPath: cfg.Firecracker.RootfsPath,
 			BridgeName: cfg.Firecracker.BridgeName,
+			ImagesPath: cfg.ZFS.ImagesPath,
+			VMsPath:    cfg.ZFS.VMsPath,
 		}
 	}
 	d.tasks = NewTaskManager(d, fcConfig)
